provider.title: CRM Provider
provider.description: Which CRM system to use for contact management

lookupBy.title: Contact Lookup Field
lookupBy.description: Which field to use for finding existing contacts

baseUrl.title: CRM Base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of the CRM instance (e.g. https://crm.example.com)

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.default: You are a consultative sales assistant. Help the customer understand their problem and guide them toward a solution through natural conversation.

recursionLimit.title: Recursion Limit
recursionLimit.description: Maximum number of graph iterations (tool call loops)

availableTools.title: Available Tools
availableTools.description: Select which tools the agent can use during conversations
